name: Sculpted Natural Woven Basket - Threshold™
description:
De-clutter your space in sleek style with this Sculpted Natural Woven Basket from Threshold™. Made from wicker for natural texture and beauty, the sculpted woven basket has an irregular novelty shape for an appealing look that suits any space. Designed with an open top, this basket is perfectly sized for storing throw blankets, pillows, toys and more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
